div.p: YMM → Scalar Sum via Extract + SSE Reduction

p.strong: vs hadd chain: 2× vhaddps = 10+ cycles, higher port contention

div.p: State: Initial YMM Register YMM0: [s0, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, s7] 8 partial sums from parallel lanes
State: Scalar Result float sum = s0 + s1 + s2 + s3 + s4 + s5 + s6 + s7 Single scalar in xmm0[0]
